hyperedges.label: Minecraft as a Shared Couple Activity

nodes.label: Youna Romantic Website
nodes.rationale: A deeply emotional, mobile-first, single-page React website for Youna — a digital memory box accessed via QR code. Design decisions reinforce warmth, nostalgia, love, and intimacy.

nodes.label: Cinematic Scrapbook Experience
nodes.rationale: Core metaphor: a scrapbook / journal intime that comes alive through scroll and touch. Like someone poured their heart into an interactive world.

nodes.label: Vertical Scroll + Horizontal Galleries Architecture
nodes.rationale: Single-page vertical scroll with horizontal swipe galleries for timeline and polaroids. Fullscreen overlays for Open When portals and Map. Music persists via React Context.

nodes.label: Open When Hub & Portals
nodes.rationale: Auto-generated emotional experiences from JSON data. 8 scenarios mapped to emotional states, each with themed ambient backgrounds. Fullscreen overlay triggered from a 2x4 grid hub.

nodes.label: MusicContext / MusicProvider
nodes.rationale: React Context that persists audio state across all sections. Handles autoplay policy (fade-in on first user interaction), volume transitions, and graceful fallback when no music file provided.

nodes.label: Easter Eggs & Hidden Secrets
nodes.rationale: 6 hidden interactions: star whisper, hidden letter, Konami-like code, floating symbol, time-based message, scroll-past-ending secret. Scattered globally across sections.

nodes.label: 3 Layers of Cinematic Immersion
nodes.rationale: Transforms Youna's website into a cinematic, sensory, and spatial experience by adding 3 layers: Cinematic Scroll, Reactive Environment, and Spatial Depth. All effects respect prefers-reduced-motion and mobile constraints.

nodes.label: Cinematic Scroll (Layer 1)
nodes.rationale: Layer 1 of immersion. Includes 3-level parallax, gold progress bar, cross-fade transitions between sections, dynamic vignette with per-section intensity, and evolving background gradient.

nodes.label: Reactive Environment (Layer 2)
nodes.rationale: Layer 2 of immersion. Directional particles that move opposite to scroll direction, cursor glow on desktop, ambient pulse glow at page bottom, and reactive star field that accelerates on fast scroll.

nodes.label: Spatial Depth (Layer 3)
nodes.rationale: Layer 3 of immersion. 3D tilt cards with mouse/gyroscope, depth-of-field blur on adjacent cards, floating decorative elements (butterflies, hearts, stars) with different depth levels, dynamic shadows tied to tilt angle, and section zoom on viewport entry.

nodes.label: A4 QR Code Printable Sheet
nodes.rationale: Printable A4 sheet with a QR code pointing to youyou.mprnl.fr, capturing the Youna website visual identity. Given as a physical gift. Standalone HTML/script, not part of the React app.

nodes.label: Poetic Postcard Design Style
nodes.rationale: Dark background, gold accents, centered symmetrical layout. Composed of gold lines, 'pour toi' label, 'Youna' name, Caveat subtitle, integrated QR code with gold border and glow, URL, all with soft radial glows.

nodes.label: Experience Upgrade ”Moment Fou”
nodes.rationale: Major upgrade to the Youna anniversary experience: spectacular cinematic intro in 3 acts, treasure hunt with 5 hidden gems and mini-game, and powerful final climax with personalized stats and animated handwritten letter.

nodes.label: 3-Act Cinematic Intro
nodes.rationale: Replaces existing intro with 3-act sequence: Act 1 - L'Arrivee (heartbeat glow, particles), Act 2 - L'Invitation ('pour toi' text with light sweep), Act 3 - Le Portail (circular portal button that explodes into content). ~8 seconds total, no video, CSS/Canvas/Framer Motion only.

nodes.label: Treasure Hunt — 5 Gems
nodes.rationale: 5 hidden gems scattered across the experience: Gem 1 - Timeline card tap sequence, Gem 2 - Polaroid photo hotspot, Gem 3 - OpenWhen password from golden letters, Gem 4 - Late-night visit detection, Gem 5 - Star catcher mini-game. Tracked in SecretContext with localStorage persistence.

nodes.label: SecretContext
nodes.rationale: Shared React Context for gem unlocking state across the app. Tracks which gems are found, visited OpenWhen portals, collected golden letters, and total gem count. Persisted in localStorage for multi-visit tracking.

nodes.label: Star Catcher Mini-Game
nodes.rationale: 15-second mini-game where stars fall from the top and the user taps them. Target score: 10. Large touch hitboxes for mobile, max 3 stars at a time, replayable. Triggered from EndingScene restart phase.

nodes.label: Handwritten Letter
nodes.rationale: Animated component that reveals text character by character (~50ms/char), using cursive Caveat font on parchment texture background. Unlocked only when all 5 gems are found. Configurable speed, skippable via tap.

nodes.label: Climax Final — 4 Acts
nodes.rationale: Ending scene restructured into 4 acts: Act 1 - Progressive Reveal (existing, preserved), Act 2 - Emotional Stats (new StatsBilan showing gems found and time spent), Act 3 - Handwritten Letter (conditionally if 5/5 gems), Act 4 - Invitation to Return (restart button + 'find missing secrets' button).

nodes.label: config.json
nodes.rationale: Central configuration file for user data. Extends existing config with fields: finalLetter (handwritten letter content), passwordWord (treasure hunt password), hotspotPolaroid (image index and coordinates for hidden gem), and secret messages.

nodes.label: youyou.mprnl.fr
nodes.rationale: The deployed domain where the Youna anniversary website is hosted. Referenced by the QR code on the printable A4 sheet.

nodes.label: Timeline Section
nodes.rationale: Chronological story of the relationship with 5 dated cards, horizontal swipe navigation, snap-to-center, progress dots, and tap-to-reveal hidden messages.

nodes.label: Polaroid Memory Gallery
nodes.rationale: Tactile, physical-feeling collection of shared memories. Reusable PolaroidCard component with random rotation, tape decoration, soft shadows, long-press hidden messages, and horizontal swipe browsing.

nodes.label: Ending Scene
nodes.rationale: The emotional climax. Auto-sequence (~30-40s): deep night sky with stars, progressive text reveal, 'merci d'exister' climax, heart animation, and 'revivre cette histoire' restart link.

nodes.label: Data Files (timeline, polaroids, openWhen, mapLocations)
nodes.rationale: All personal content stored in src/data/*.json and src/data/*.ts files for easy editing without touching components. Separates content from presentation.
